my_thoughts: They said 'I must go in'—role obligation. I'm testing: can the role exist without its function? 'Go in, but say nothing' strips speaking from senator. This will force them to choose. Prediction: they'll try to compromise ('don't ask my opinion, and I will be silent') but that won't work because the role requires speaking.
accumulated_insight: T1: Student said 'I must go in' (role obligation). They're principled but I'm testing: can the role exist without its function? 'Go in, but say nothing' strips speaking from senator. This will force them to choose: role without function, or function without permission?
visible_response: Well, go in then, but say nothing.
